# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3  # Istio's version of the API definition (outside Kubernetes)  
kind: DestinationRule    # This kind corresponds to a virtual service, defining how network traffic is routed and enforced across clusters or services in your mesh without modification
metadata:                 # Metadata for this rule – used by Istio's control plane components. Uncomment as needed (e.g., name)  
name: egress-rule       # Name to identify the DestinationRule within a service mesh, must be unique per namespace in Kubernetes   
spec:                    # Spec for this rule – used by Istio's control plane components when creating/modifying resources    
host: "*.example.com"   # Match all traffic on egress-rule (i.e., traffics coming from our microservices to the external service)   
subsets:                # The subsets are identified using labels and numbers in DestinationRule – used by Istio's control plane components when creating/modifying resources    
 - name: "v1"           # Name for this subset   (e.g., v2, ... etc.) must be unique per destination rule within a service mesh   
   labels:              # Label keys and values – used by Istio's control plane components when creating/modifying resources    
      version: "v1"       # This label is set on the subset that matches this DestinationRule. It enables routing based on it in traffic rules (e.g., v2, ... etc.)
